revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)}}, {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神}} |Shrine rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Q11]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=draft}} |Shrine rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|12=draft}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市|12=draft}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=draft}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮|12=draft}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|12=draft}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=draft}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=draft}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁|12=draft}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=draft}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|12=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Q11]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}}

Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|12=draft}}, {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|12=draft}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=draft}} |Shrine rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|12=draft}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市|12=draft}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=draft}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮|12=draft}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|12=draft}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=draft}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=draft}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁|12=draft}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=draft}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|12=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Q11]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}}

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|12=draft|12=draft}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=draft|12=draft}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|12=draft|12=draft}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|12=draft|12=draft}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|12=draft|12=draft}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市|12=draft|12=draft}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|12=draft|12=draft}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=draft|12=draft}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮|12=draft|12=draft}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|12=draft|12=draft}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=draft|12=draft}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=draft|12=draft}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁|12=draft|12=draft}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=draft|12=draft}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|12=draft|12=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=draft|12=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}}

revision.comment: 34 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:相馬神社 (札幌市) up to rev 96656572
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 =相馬神社 |画像 =[[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
拝殿 |所在地 =[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[豊平区]]平岸2条18丁目1番1号 | 緯度度 = 43 | 緯度分 = 1 | 緯度秒 = 13.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 141 |経度分 = 21 | 経度秒 = 53.2 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |地図 =Sapporo2 |祭神 =天之御中主大神 |社格 =無格社 |創建 =[[1871年]]（明治4年） |本殿 =[[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 =9月5日 |神事 = }} '''相馬神社'''（そうまじんじゃ）は[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[豊平区]][[平岸 (札幌市)|平岸]]にある[[神社]]。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は無格社。 == 沿革 == * [[1871年]]（明治4年）3月 [[仙台藩]]領[[水沢市|水沢]]からの入植者により、現在地にて[[北海道神宮|札幌神社]]の遥拝所として祭事を執行。 * [[1902年]]（明治35年）1月 [[福島県]][[相馬郡]][[南相馬市|太田村]]に鎮座する[[相馬太田神社]]より御分霊を奉遷し、[[豊平町 (北海道)|豊平町]]5番地（現[[豊平 (札幌市)|豊平]]6条7丁目、豊平まちづくりセンター）の仮神殿に奉斎。 * [[1908年]]（明治41年）10月27日 神社創立を認可され公認神社となる。 * [[1909年]]（明治42年）11月26日 本殿落成遷座祭斎行。豊平町平岸村47番地に鎮座。 * [[1916年]]（大正5年）8月1日 平岸村山の上437番地の現在地（[[天神山 (北海道)|天神山]]）に移転。 * [[1928年]]（昭和3年）10月9日 [[昭和天皇]]御即位記念として社殿をご造営。本殿御造営改築遷座祭斎行（旧社殿）。 * [[1953年]]（昭和28年）2月26日 [[神社本庁]]所属の宗教法人を設立。 * [[1965年]]（昭和40年）10月30日 社務所新築。 * [[1976年]]（昭和51年）3月1日 付近一帯が、天神山緑地保全地区に指定される。 * [[2007年]]（平成19年）8月25日 創立百周年記念事業御社殿改修工事竣工本殿遷座祭斎行。（現社殿） * [[2008年]]（平成20年）6月24日 創立百周年記念大祭並びに記念祝賀会斎行。 == 祭神 == *[[天之御中主大神]]（あめのみなかぬしのおおかみ） == 御神木 == [[クリ|シバグリ]]の大樹で、樹直径121cm、樹高10m。推定樹齢は300年以上『札幌秘境100選』。 [[1968年]]8月5日に札幌市の保存樹に指定された。 == 交通手段 == *[[札幌市営地下鉄南北線]][[澄川駅]]から徒歩7分程度。 == ギャラリー == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|御神木 File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|「馬頭観世音菩薩」碑 File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|馬魂碑 File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|平岸開村五拾年記念碑 == 脚注 == == 参考文献 == {{commonscat|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} *「73 相馬神社のご神木（豊平区平岸）」、[[青木由直]]編著『札幌秘境100選』マップショップ、2006年10月。ISBN 4-9903282-0-5 == 関連項目 == * [[平岸天満宮]] * [[天神山 (北海道)]] ==外部リンク== * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 相馬神社] - 北海道神社庁 {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}} {{DEFAULTSORT:そうましんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:相馬神社]] [[Category:北海道の旧無格社]] [[Category:豊平区の歴史]] [[Category:豊平区の建築物]]

拝殿 |所在地 =[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[豊平区]]平岸2条18丁目1番1号 | 緯度度 = 43 | 緯度分 = 1 | 緯度秒 = 13.6 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 141 |経度分 = 21 | 経度秒 = 53.2 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |地図 =Sapporo2 |祭神 =天之御中主大神 |社格 =無格社 |創建 =[[1871年]]（明治4年） |本殿 =[[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 =9月5日 |神事 = }} '''相馬神社'''（そうまじんじゃ）は[[北海道]][[札幌市]][[豊平区]][[平岸 (札幌市)|平岸]]にある[[神社]]。[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は無格社。 == 沿革 == * [[1871年]]（明治4年）3月 [[仙台藩]]領[[水沢市|水沢]]からの入植者により、現在地にて[[北海道神宮|札幌神社]]の遥拝所として祭事を執行。 * [[1902年]]（明治35年）1月 [[福島県]][[相馬郡]][[南相馬市|太田村]]に鎮座する[[相馬太田神社]]より御分霊を奉遷し、[[豊平町 (北海道)|豊平町]]5番地（現[[豊平 (札幌市)|豊平]]6条7丁目、豊平まちづくりセンター）の仮神殿に奉斎。 * [[1908年]]（明治41年）10月27日 神社創立を認可され公認神社となる。 * [[1909年]]（明治42年）11月26日 本殿落成遷座祭斎行。豊平町平岸村47番地に鎮座。 * [[1916年]]（大正5年）8月1日 平岸村山の上437番地の現在地（[[天神山 (北海道)|天神山]]）に移転。 * [[1928年]]（昭和3年）10月9日 [[昭和天皇]]御即位記念として社殿をご造営。本殿御造営改築遷座祭斎行（旧社殿）。 * [[1953年]]（昭和28年）2月26日 [[神社本庁]]所属の宗教法人を設立。 * [[1965年]]（昭和40年）10月30日 社務所新築。 * [[1976年]]（昭和51年）3月1日 付近一帯が、天神山緑地保全地区に指定される。 * [[2007年]]（平成19年）8月25日 創立百周年記念事業御社殿改修工事竣工本殿遷座祭斎行。（現社殿） * [[2008年]]（平成20年）6月24日 創立百周年記念大祭並びに記念祝賀会斎行。 == 祭神 == *[[天之御中主大神]]（あめのみなかぬしのおおかみ） == 御神木 == [[クリ|シバグリ]]の大樹で、樹直径121cm、樹高10m。推定樹齢は300年以上『札幌秘境100選』。 [[1968年]]8月5日に札幌市の保存樹に指定された。 == 交通手段 == *[[札幌市営地下鉄南北線]][[澄川駅]]から徒歩7分程度。 == ギャラリー == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|御神木 File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|「馬頭観世音菩薩」碑 File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|馬魂碑 File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|平岸開村五拾年記念碑 == 脚注 == == 参考文献 == {{commonscat|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} *「73 相馬神社のご神木（豊平区平岸）」、[[青木由直]]編著『札幌秘境100選』マップショップ、2006年10月。ISBN 4-9903282-0-5 == 関連項目 == * [[平岸天満宮]] * [[天神山 (北海道)]] ==外部リンク== * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 相馬神社] - 北海道神社庁 {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=北海道}} {{DEFAULTSORT:そうましんしや}} [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:相馬神社]] [[Category:北海道の旧無格社]] [[Category:豊平区の歴史]] [[Category:豊平区の建築物]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|ja|豊平区|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|ja|北海道|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}}

It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern type System|ja|近代社格制度|1=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|ja|水沢市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|ja|仙台藩|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft}} for {{ill|Hokkaido Shrine|ja|北海道神宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県|qq=draft|qq=draft}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Jinja Honchō|ja|神社本庁|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]]

Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|ja|神社本庁|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinja Honchō|qq=}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|ja|澄川駅|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumikawa Station|qq=}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]]

It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|qq=}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:北海道の旧無格社]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:北海道の旧無格社]] [[Category:札幌市の神社]] [[Category:相馬神社]] [[Category:豊平区の建築物]] [[Category:豊平区の歴史]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma shrines]] [[Category:Ungraded shrines in Hokkaido]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira Ward]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:北海道の旧無格社]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo�]] [[Category:相馬神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:豊平区の歴史]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:豊平区の歴史]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]]

revision.comment: Merge [[Category:Shrines in Sapporo]] into [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] via bot
revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|qq=}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[ja:%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:豊平区の歴史]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[sn:E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:paes with no wikidata]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|qq=}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[sn:E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[sn:E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11582525]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:28, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Add wikidata]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|qq=}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[sn:E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]][[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11582525]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:28, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|qq=|1=Hiragishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482656}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[sn:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[sn:E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE (%E6%9C%AD%E5%B9%8C%E5%B8%82)]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[sn:ōma Shrine (Sapporo)]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[en:Sōma Shrine (Sapporo)]]

[[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11582525]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:28, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|qq=|1=Hiragishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482656}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] [[Category:qq]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}}
