Hokkaido|ja|天神山|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|qq=|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}}

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|1=Hiragishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482656}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:相馬神社]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[ja:相馬神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11582525]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:28, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|1=Hiragishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482656}}, [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]] |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|Toyohira Ward, Sapporo]], [[:en:Hokkaido|Hokkaido]], specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the [[:en:Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines]]. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from [[:en:Mizusawa, Iwate|Mizusawa, Iwate]], formerly part of the [[:en:Sendai Domain|Sendai Domain]], established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Hokkaidō Shrine|Hokkaido Shrine]], conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]] was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under [[:en:Association of Shinto Shrines|Association of Shinto Shrines]]. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large [[:en:Castanea_crenata|chestnut tree]] with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from [[:en:Sumikawa Station|Sumikawa Station]] on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] }} [[ja:相馬神社]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

shrines}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|en|Mizusawa, Iwate|WD=Q1133151|lt=Mizusawa, Iwate}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for {{ill|Hokkaidō Shrine|en|Hokkaidō Shrine|WD=Q710826|lt=Hokkaido Shrine}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|WD=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|en|Association of Shinto Shrines|WD=Q908077|lt=Association of Shinto Shrines}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large {{ill|Castanea_crenata|en|Castanea_crenata|WD=Q717827|lt=chestnut tree}} with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|en|Sumikawa Station|WD=Q3563679|lt=Sumikawa Station}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjin-yama Park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:相馬神社]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[ja:相馬神社]] [[ja:相馬神社]] [[ja:相馬神社]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Sōma Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Souma Jinja Shrine Sapporo.jpg|240px]]
Main Hall |location = {{ill|Hiragishi, Sapporo|ja|平岸 (札幌市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi, Sapporo|1=Hiragishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482656}}, {{ill|Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|en|Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|WD=Q1134225|lt=Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|1=Toyohira-ku, Sapporo}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|WD=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido|1=Hokkaido}} |Latitude degrees = 43 |Latitude minutes = 1 |Latitude seconds = 13.6 |N/S = N |Longitude degrees = 141 |Longitude minutes = 21 |Longitude seconds = 53.2 |E/W = E |Map Country Code = JP |Map = Sapporo2 |deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} |Shrine Rank = Ungraded shrine |consecration_year = 1871 (Meiji 4) |Main hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Alternate name = |Festival = September 5 |Ceremonies = }} '''Sōma Shrine''' (相馬神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|en|Toyohira-ku, Sapporo|WD=Q1134225|lt=Toyohira Ward, Sapporo|1=Toyohira-ku, Sapporo}}, {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|WD=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido|1=Hokkaido}}, specifically in the Hiragishi district. It holds the historical Rank of an ungraded shrine under the {{ill|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|en|Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534|lt=Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. == History == * In March 1871 (Meiji 4), settlers from {{ill|Mizusawa, Iwate|en|Mizusawa, Iwate|WD=Q1133151|lt=Mizusawa, Iwate|1=Mizusawa, Iwate}}, formerly part of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|WD=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}}, established the shrine as a {{ill|Haisho|lt=Haisho|lt=Yōhaijo|ja|遥拝所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yōhaijo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for {{ill|Hokkaidō Shrine|en|Hokkaidō Shrine|WD=Q710826|lt=Hokkaido Shrine|1=Hokkaidō Shrine}}, conducting rituals at the current location. * In January 1902 (Meiji 35), a divided spirit of the deity from {{ill|Sōma Ōta Shrine|ja|相馬太田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōma Ōta Shrine|qq=}} in {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|WD=Q71707|lt=Fukushima Prefecture|1=Fukushima Prefecture}} was enshrined in a temporary hall at Toyohira Town (now Hiragishi 6-jō 7-chōme). * In October 1908 (Meiji 41), the shrine received official recognition as a public Shinto shrine. * In November 1909 (Meiji 42), the main hall was completed, and the shrine was relocated to its current location on {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Tenjinyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443216}}. * In 1928 (Shōwa 3), a new shrine building was constructed in commemoration of the {{ill|Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja|昭和天皇即位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōwa Emperor's Enthronement|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * In 1953 (Shōwa 28), the shrine was incorporated as a religious entity under {{ill|Association of Shinto Shrines|en|Association of Shinto Shrines|WD=Q908077|lt=Association of Shinto Shrines|1=Association of Shinto Shrines}}. * In 2007 (Heisei 19), a major renovation was completed in celebration of the shrine's 100th anniversary. == deity == * {{ill|Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja|天之御中主大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Minakanushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天之御中主神}} == Sacred Tree == The shrine's sacred tree is a large {{ill|Castanea_crenata|en|Castanea_crenata|WD=Q717827|lt=chestnut tree|1=Castanea crenata}} with a trunk diameter of 121 cm and a height of 10 meters, estimated to be over 300 years old青木由直編著『札幌秘境100選』. It was designated as a protected tree by Sapporo City on August 5, 1968. == Access == * Approximately a 7-minute walk from {{ill|Sumikawa Station|en|Sumikawa Station|WD=Q3563679|lt=Sumikawa Station|1=Sumikawa Station}} on the Sapporo Municipal Subway's Namboku Line. == Gallery == File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - Divine Tree.JPG|Sacred Tree File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to Hayagriva.JPG|Monument to Hayagriva File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to horses' spirits.JPG|Horse Spirit Monument File:Soma Shrine of Sapporo - monument to the 50th anniversary of Hiragishi.JPG|50th Anniversary Monument for Hiragishi Settlement == References == == See Also == * {{ill|Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja|平岸天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiragishi Tenmangū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|ja|天神山 (北海道)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinyama, Hokkaido|1=Mount Tenjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443218}} == External Links == * [https://hokkaidojinjacho.jp/%E7%9B%B8%E9%A6%AC%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Official site - Hokkaido Shrine Association] {{Shinto Horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Prefecture-stub|pref=Hokkaido}} {{translated page|ja|相馬神社 (札幌市)|version=96656572|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:相馬神社]] {{Commons category|Soma-jinja of Sapporo}} [[ja:相馬神社 (札幌市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11582525}} [[Category:Buildings in Toyohira-ku, Sapporo]] [[Category:Former Unranked Shrines in Hokkaidō Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Toyohira Ward]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Sapporo]] [[Category:Sōma Shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:pages]]
